# Copilot Instructions - Chatbots Analytics Workspace

## Project Context

This workspace manages Flowise chatbot projects and their analytics.

- Backend: Python 3.12, Flask (port 5050), OpenAI API
- Frontend: React + Vite, recharts, dark theme
- Data: Chatbot conversation messages (JSON exports from Flowise)
- Flowise API: https://ecoflow.koppi.mx

## Data Analytics Skills

The following skills are available in `.github/copilot/skills/data-analytics/`:

- **programmatic-eda**: Systematic exploratory data analysis with automated quality checks
- **data-quality-audit**: Data quality assessment against business rules
- **root-cause-investigation**: Investigate why metrics changed with drill-downs and hypothesis testing
- **funnel-analysis**: Conversion funnel analysis with drop-off investigation
- **insight-synthesis**: Transform data findings into actionable business insights
- **executive-summary-generator**: Create decision-ready executive summaries
- **visualization-builder**: Create publication-ready data visualizations

Use these skills when performing data analysis tasks on chatbot conversation data.
